container_template.readme:
# SGLang

Serve Hugging Face models with the official `SGLang` runtime on SaladCloud GPUs.

This container exposes an OpenAI-compatible API for chat completions and related clients. It does not include a built-in web UI.

## Access

- <Link url={`https://${props.networking.dns}/health`}>Health Check</Link>
- <Link url={`https://${props.networking.dns}/v1/models`}>List Models</Link>

## Notes

- Startup can take several minutes because models are downloaded from Hugging Face at container startup.
- Parser settings are model-specific. If your model does not support the configured parser, update the container group settings and redeploy.
- On Blackwell GPUs, hybrid Qwen models may require `Attention Backend = triton`.
- To use a direct response instead of a reasoning response for supported models, include `chat_template_kwargs: {"enable_thinking": false}` in the request body.
- The default context in this recipe is `32768`, but larger models or weaker GPUs may still need lower values.

<Callout variation="note">If your model is private or gated on Hugging Face, set `HF_TOKEN` in the container group environment variables.</Callout>

## Curl Example

<Callout variation="note">Omit the `Salad-Api-Key` header if auth is disabled.</Callout>

<CodeBlock language="bash">{`curl https://${props.networking.dns}/v1/chat/completions \\
  -X POST \\
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \\
  -H 'Salad-Api-Key: ${props.apiKey}' \\
  -d '{\n    "model": "${props.container.environmentVariables.SGLANG_SERVED_MODEL_NAME || props.container.environmentVariables.SGLANG_MODEL_ID}",\n    "messages": [\n      {"role": "system", "content": "You are a helpful assistant."},\n      {"role": "user", "content": "Explain how tensor parallelism affects inference serving."}\n    ],\n    "max_tokens": 256\n  }'
`}</CodeBlock>

## Resources

- [SGLang Documentation](https://docs.sglang.io/)
- [SGLang server arguments](https://docs.sglang.io/advanced_features/server_arguments.html)
- [SGLang OpenAI-compatible API docs](https://docs.sglang.io/basic_usage/openai_api.html)
- [Recipe Source](https://github.com/SaladTechnologies/salad-recipes/tree/master/recipes/sglang)
- <Link url={`https://github.com/SaladTechnologies/salad-recipes/issues/new?title=SGLang%20recipe&body=Image%3A%20${props.container.image}`}>Report an Issue on GitHub</Link>

command: set -eu; set -- python3 -m sglang.launch_server --model-path "${SGLANG_MODEL_ID}" --host '::' --port 8000 --tp-size "${SGLANG_TP_SIZE}" --mem-fraction-static "${SGLANG_MEM_FRACTION_STATIC}" --load-format "${SGLANG_LOAD_FORMAT}" --sampling-defaults "${SGLANG_SAMPLING_DEFAULTS}"; [ -n "${SGLANG_SERVED_MODEL_NAME:-}" ] && set -- "$@" --served-model-name "$SGLANG_SERVED_MODEL_NAME"; [ -n "${SGLANG_CONTEXT_LENGTH:-}" ] && set -- "$@" --context-length "$SGLANG_CONTEXT_LENGTH"; [ -n "${SGLANG_ATTENTION_BACKEND:-}" ] && set -- "$@" --attention-backend "$SGLANG_ATTENTION_BACKEND"; [ -n "${SGLANG_REASONING_PARSER:-}" ] && set -- "$@" --reasoning-parser "$SGLANG_REASONING_PARSER"; [ -n "${SGLANG_TOOL_CALL_PARSER:-}" ] && set -- "$@" --tool-call-parser "$SGLANG_TOOL_CALL_PARSER"; [ -n "${SGLANG_HF_CHAT_TEMPLATE_NAME:-}" ] && set -- "$@" --hf-chat-template-name "$SGLANG_HF_CHAT_TEMPLATE_NAME"; [ "${SGLANG_TRUST_REMOTE_CODE:-false}" = "true" ] && set -- "$@" --trust-remote-code; [ "${SGLANG_DISABLE_CUDA_GRAPH:-true}" = "true" ] && set -- "$@" --disable-cuda-graph; exec "$@"

form.title: SGLang
form.description:
Run large language models with [SGLang](https://docs.sglang.io/), a high-performance inference engine with an OpenAI-compatible API and strong support for reasoning models, tool calling, and high-throughput serving.

<Callout variation="warning">Ensure your use is permissible under whatever license applies to the model you deploy.</Callout>

This recipe is aimed at a more technical audience. All model and runtime settings used by this recipe are exposed in the deployment form.

Fields like `Load Format`, `Sampling Defaults Source`, `Reasoning Parser`, and `Tool Call Parser` accept raw SGLang argument values. 

Example models you can use:

- `Qwen/Qwen3.5-9B` with `Reasoning Parser = qwen3` and `Tool Call Parser = qwen3_coder` (default)
- `Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct` with `Tool Call Parser = qwen25`
- `meta-llama/Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct` with `Tool Call Parser = llama3`
- `deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-7B` with `Reasoning Parser = deepseek-r1`
- `mistralai/Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.3` with `Tool Call Parser = mistral`

Examples of SGLang option values you can enter:

- `Load Format`: `auto`, `safetensors`, `gguf`, `bitsandbytes`
- `Sampling Defaults Source`: `model`, `openai`
- `Attention Backend`: `triton`, `trtllm_mha`
- `Reasoning Parser`: `qwen3`, `deepseek-r1`, `gpt-oss`
- `Tool Call Parser`: `qwen3_coder`, `qwen25`, `llama3`, `mistral`

If a model is private or gated on Hugging Face, provide `HF_TOKEN`.

Notes:

- `Served Model Name` is optional. If left blank, SGLang will use the model ID returned by `/v1/models`.
- `Context Length` can be left blank to use the model's own configured max context.
- The default `Context Length` is `32768`, which is a more practical startup default than the model maximum on Salad consumer GPUs.
- Parser settings are model-specific. Leave them blank if your model does not need a matching parser.
- `Attention Backend = triton` and `Disable CUDA Graph = true` are safer defaults for hybrid Qwen models on newer consumer GPUs.
- Gateway authentication is enabled by default in this recipe.

For additional SGLang options not exposed by the form, use Advanced Configuration after deployment.

Helpful references:

- [SGLang server arguments](https://docs.sglang.io/advanced_features/server_arguments.html)
- [SGLang OpenAI-compatible API docs](https://docs.sglang.io/basic_usage/openai_api.html)
- [SGLang supported models](https://docs.sglang.io/supported_models/generative_models.html)

container_group_name.title: Container Group Name
container_group_name.description: Required* Must be 2-63 lowercase letters, numbers, or hyphens. Cannot start with a number or start or end with a hyphen.

model_id.title: Model
model_id.description: Required* Hugging Face model ID to load with SGLang (`--model-path`).

served_model_name.title: Served Model Name
served_model_name.description: Optional. Override the model name returned by `/v1/models`. Leave blank to use the model ID.

hf_token.title: Hugging Face Token
hf_token.description: Optional. Required only for private or gated Hugging Face models.

context_length.title: Context Length
context_length.description: Optional `--context-length`. Leave blank to let SGLang use the model's default context size.

mem_fraction_static.title: Memory Fraction Static
mem_fraction_static.description: Fraction of GPU memory reserved for model weights and KV cache (`--mem-fraction-static`). Lower this if you see out-of-memory errors.

load_format.title: Load Format
load_format.description: SGLang model loading format (`--load-format`). Enter any SGLang-supported value.

sampling_defaults.title: Sampling Defaults Source
sampling_defaults.description: Sampling defaults source (`--sampling-defaults`). Enter any SGLang-supported value.

attention_backend.title: Attention Backend
attention_backend.description: Optional `--attention-backend`. Enter any SGLang-supported backend name, or leave blank to let SGLang choose.

reasoning_parser.title: Reasoning Parser
reasoning_parser.description: Optional `--reasoning-parser`. Enter any SGLang-supported parser name, or leave blank.

tool_call_parser.title: Tool Call Parser
tool_call_parser.description: Optional `--tool-call-parser`. Enter any SGLang-supported parser name, or leave blank.

hf_chat_template_name.title: HF Chat Template Name
hf_chat_template_name.description: Optional `--hf-chat-template-name` for tokenizers that expose multiple named chat templates.

trust_remote_code.title: Trust Remote Code
trust_remote_code.description: Enable `--trust-remote-code` for Hugging Face repos that require custom model code.

disable_cuda_graph.title: Disable CUDA Graph
disable_cuda_graph.description: Disable CUDA graph capture (`--disable-cuda-graph`). This can improve startup reliability on some consumer GPUs.

networking_auth.title: Require Container Gateway Authentication
networking_auth.description: When enabled, requests must include a SaladCloud API Key to access the container. When disabled, public (unauthenticated) access is allowed.

short_description: Serve LLMs with SGLang on SaladCloud GPUs using an OpenAI-compatible API.
